sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR, s2 VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE test_dates (start_date DATE, days_to_subtract INTEGER);
SELECT editdist3(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE distance > 2;
SELECT start_date - INTERVAL (d.days_to_subtract) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates AS d WHERE adjusted_date < DATE '2023-01-10';
SELECT s1, s2, editdist3(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE editdist3(s1, s2) < 3 ORDER BY distance DESC;
SELECT t1.s1, t2.s2, editdist3(t1.s1, t2.s2) AS distance FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON editdist3(t1.s1, t2.s2) < 2;
SELECT start_date, days_to_subtract, start_date - INTERVAL (days_to_subtract) DAY AS new_date FROM test_dates WHERE new_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.s1, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON editdist3(t1.s1, t2.s2) < 3 GROUP BY t1.s1 HAVING count > 1;
